title: Crypto.com - REKT
relevance_summary: Large-scale withdrawal from centralized exchange followed by tumbler usage

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds to known tumblers within a short timeframe after large withdrawals

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sends funds to known tumblers within a short timeframe after large withdrawals
summary: Crypto.com suffered a significant hack resulting in the theft of over $33.7M worth of cryptocurrencies. Attackers bypassed 2FA and withdrawal whitelists to drain user wallets and subsequently laundered the funds through a known tumbler. A guard could have detected and blocked these transactions by monitoring for large withdrawals followed by transfers to known tumblers.
